creator: terry-freebsd@glaver.org
text:
Please change the state of this PR back to open, because:

1) Behavior was introduced some time ago which causes this port to segfault unless specific command-line options are given.

2) Getting things working using the suggested workaround involves changing a sysctl which affects other things besides this port.

3) Having the port apparently default to using IPv6 (and then not working using IPv6) is counterintuitive to the way it used to work and the way [at least some] users expect it to work.

The fact is, it used to work "out of the box". It doesn't any more.
